story.text: A patrol fold per gateway that senses seam health: queue age, passed-but-unpulled count, refusal rate, amendment churn, bypass attempts, capacity pressure, stalled-ready slices. Read-only sensor (not a judge), level-triggered, silent unless it detects a deficit. The crucial shift: it watches passed-but-NOT-consumed work, because that is the current failure mode — the existing surfaces watch refusals, not accumulation. Value: the loop finally senses the thing actually killing it (confirmed work that never lands).

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'landing-throughput' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.landing-throughput-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
